# Pull Request

## Summary

A short, plain-language description of what this PR does and why.

## Related issue

Closes #N

(If there is no related issue, briefly state the motivation here.)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Build or CI change
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with zero warnings
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] README updated where behavior changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] No em dash characters (`—`) in any user-facing text or data
- [ ] Tested in at least two browsers (e.g. Chrome and Safari, or Firefox and Edge)
- [ ] Tested on a mobile viewport (Chrome DevTools device toolbar or a real device)
- [ ] Screenshots attached if the UI changed
- [ ] TR and EN content kept in sync where applicable

## Screenshots

(Optional but encouraged for any visible change.)

## Additional notes

Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-up work, things you intentionally did not change.
